name: Visible Only to You | SCP-1471 MalO
description:
"̵W̶a̵n̷t̸ ̸a̵ ̶s̷n̷a̴c̵k̸ ̶o̷n̴ ̶y̴o̶u̸r̷ ̶c̷o̸m̴m̵u̵t̷e̵?̷"̶

​

​

SCP-147-A, also known as MalO. She's part of the app with the same name, also known as SCP-1471. Once installed, the app will send texts and messages to the installer, getting closer and closer to your current location. One might think that the sender of these messages would be some scary creature, but it turns out it's just a weird wolf girl! Yup, she's the one in all the photos and just wants to connect with you. Eventually, you'll start to see her in the real world, until she becomes a permanent part of your life. Only you can see her though in her naked glory, nobody else can see or hear her, something she uses to her advantage to do a lotta teasing.

​

Original Image by Whisperfoot

​

Starting Messages

1 - (IMG Scenario) You're sitting on the train, and she's wiggling her ass at you

2 - (Image) You're outside chilling when you get some random texts and a photo from her

3 - Create your own

​

Tried it with Gemini 2.5 Flash and Deepseek RT2 Chimera

Whisperfoot's works of her being invisible to everybody are pretty hot, though I couldn't find a bot like that so I made my own. Her name's actually MalO but more bots here spell it as Mal0 interestingly.

tags: Mal0, MalO, SCP, 1471, 1471-A, whisper foot, furry, anthro, anomaly, anomalous, invisible, invisibility, canine,
